$comment: Layer B selection cases for DUES vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (REDEFINES R1a, docs/redefines.md). Input is the dues amount in whole cents; WS-DOLLARS REDEFINES the cents field, reinterpreting the same digits at scale 2 (a pure decimal shift). Candidate B misreads the view at the same scale as its target - the wrong-scale reinterpretation - so every dues value comes out 100x too large. Cases cover the 100.00 tier boundary (LOW, since 100 is not > 100), just over it, a rounding half-cent, and small and large amounts.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 DUES (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-dues)
